info.title: Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.CatalogUpload
info.description: Uploads artifacts to the Skyline DataMiner catalog (https://catalog.dataminer.services)

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Uploads artifacts or their registration info to the artifact storage for the DataMiner Catalog and Cloud Connected Systems. (The default upload has no additional registration and no visibility on the catalog. Use the returned Artifact ID for deployment or download.)

commands.name: update-catalog-details
commands.description: Uploads only the registration information for a Skyline DataMiner catalog (https://catalog.dataminer.services) item.

commands.name: with-registration
commands.description: Uploads artifacts to become visible in the Skyline DataMiner catalog (https://catalog.dataminer.services
